title: json_skip_number should reject invalid exponents for consistency
description: json_skip_number accepts 1e, 1e+, 1E- with no exponent digits. Per RFC 8259 these are invalid. The fix is one line: after consuming the optional sign, require at least one digit, returning an error if absent. Suggested rewrite: after the sign consume, add: if !chars.peek().map(|c| c.is_ascii_digit()).unwrap_or(false) { return Err(SecretError::DecodeFailed("invalid JSON number exponent".into())); }. The function currently returns () not Result, so this requires changing the signature to Result<(), SecretError> and updating json_skip_value to propagate the error.
